name: plan-audit-report
description: Standalone HTML rendering of the plan-verifier's Plan Verification Report: a Plan/Goal/Verdict header with a coloured verdict pill, requirement coverage, gaps, extras, file references, ordering issues, task-quality notes, a tasks-complete tally, and a verdict rationale. Self-contained, zero-JS.

slots.description: Report title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label, e.g. plan area.
Binary verdict; set the pill class to .pass or .fail.
Requirement-to-task coverage rows; one li each.
Coverage status, e.g. 'Task N ✓' or 'NOT COVERED ✗'.
Gaps; one li each. Write 'None' if empty.
Unjustified tasks; one li each. Write 'None' if empty.
Referenced paths and existence status; one li each. Write 'None' if empty.
A path referenced by the plan.
Ordering violations; one li each. Write 'None' if empty.
Task-quality problems; one li each. Write 'None' if empty.
2-3 sentences; if FAIL, the most critical reason.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.
